items.headline: Mitchell healthy for Fever's season, no regrets pushing limit in playoffs
items.description: Indiana Fever All-Star Kelsey Mitchell says she has no regrets in pushing herself to the limit before her legs gave out in last year's playoffs against Las Vegas.

items.headline: Val Ackerman, who guided Big East after team exodus, to retire
items.description: Val Ackerman is retiring this summer after leading the Big East as commissioner for 13 years, leading the conference through realignment and team exodus, as well as eight national championships during her tenure.

items.headline: Kenya's Sharon Lokedi repeats as Boston Marathon winner
items.description: Sharon Lokedi won the Boston Marathon for the second straight year Monday, winning the women's race in 2 hours, 18 minutes, 51 seconds.

items.headline: Sources: Nets sign coach Jordi Fernandez, staff to extensions
items.description: The Nets have signed head coach Jordi Fernandez and his entire coaching staff to multi-year contract extensions, sources told ESPN.

items.headline: Blazers not furnishing fans with T-shirts invites cash questions
items.description: The Portland Trail Blazers won't give away T-shirts for fans when they take on the San Antonio Spurs in Game 3 and 4 of the opening series, another in a series of moves that has drawn questions about the team's cost-cutting and finances.

items.headline: Gray leaves Boston's game against Tigers due to hamstring tightness
items.description: Red Sox starter Sonny Gray left because of right hamstring tightness in the third inning of Monday's Patriots' Day game against the Detroit Tigers.

items.headline: Punjab FC secure big win over Inter Kashi in ISL; Manpreet Singh named in India men's coaching camp: Indian Sports LIVE, April 20
items.description: Here are all the updates from Indian sports on April 20, 2026.

items.headline: Nahid Rana shows there's more to him than just pace
items.description: His 5 for 32 was the performance of an express bowler and a thinking bowler rolled into one

items.headline: Formula 1 confirm rule tweaks in time for Miami Grand Prix
items.description: Formula 1 has agreed to a set of rules tweaks to address concerns about its controversial new cars ahead of the Miami Grand Prix on May 3.

items.headline: Highest-paid NFL players: Most guaranteed money at every position
items.description: We have seen a fair share of massive contracts in the NFL. So who tops the highest-paid list at every position as of today?

items.headline: Cowboys give Brandon Aubrey 4-year deal averaging $7M per season
items.description: Brandon Aubrey and the Cowboys reached an agreement Monday on a deal that will make him the highest-paid kicker in NFL history, his agents told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

items.headline: WNBA draft: Mystics, Storm, Lynx and Wings get top marks
items.description: One team set the curve with an A+. Three got A grades, including Dallas for picking Azzi Fudd. But one got a D.

items.headline: 2026 MLB awards tracker: Odds for MVP, Cy Young, Rookie of the Year
items.description: Who are the favorites to win seasonlong honors? Here are the odds for MVP, Cy Young and Rookie of the Year in the AL and NL.

items.headline: Steph Curry, Paige Bueckers among top athletes at Coachella 2026
items.description: One of the biggest music festivals each year came and went with big name athletes taking in the desert.

items.headline: Marco Rose to replace Andoni Iraola as Bournemouth head coach
items.description: Bournemouth have confirmed Marco Rose will replace the departing Andoni Iraola at the end of the season.
